sourcesContent:
// funds.js — SpaceX fund data
// Source: AAII 2026 Mutual Fund Guide, Morningstar, InvestmentNews,
//         fund company filings through Q1 2026.
// Post-IPO weights will be pulled from fund issuer CSVs + SEC EDGAR.

export const META = {
  last_updated: "June 1, 2026",
  spacex_ipo_date: "2026-06-12T09:30:00-04:00",
  spacex_ticker: "SPACE",
};

// bucket values: "pre-ipo" | "post-ipo" | "no"
export const FUNDS = [
  // ── PRE-IPO: Private holders ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    ticker: "BPTRX",
    name: "Baron Partners Fund",
    family: "Baron",
    type: "Active Mutual Fund",
    aum: 5.2,
    er: 2.0,
    bucket: "pre-ipo",
    weight: 29.0,
    value_b: null,
    note: "Highest SpaceX concentration of any fund — ~29% of the entire portfolio. Ron Baron has held SpaceX for years via private rounds.",
    source: "Baron fund filing Q1 2026",
    source_url: "https://www.baronfunds.com/baron-partners-fund",
  },
  {
    ticker: "RONB",
    name: "Baron First Principles ETF",

    aum: 1.2,
    er: 1.0,

    weight: 14.0,
    value_b: null,
    note: "~14% SpaceX + ~3.5% xAI — the most concentrated SpaceX ETF publicly available.",

    source: "Liberty Street Advisors press release, Feb 2026",

  },
  {
    ticker: "FCNTX",
    name: "Fidelity Contrafund",

    weight: 5.1,

    source: "AAII 2026 Mutual Fund Guide",
    source_url: "https://fundresearch.fidelity.com/mutual-funds/composition/316345203",
  },

  // ── POST-IPO: Index rule adders ──────────────────────────────────────────

    ticker: "QQQ",

    est_exposure: "$470–$700 per $100k",
    index: "Nasdaq 100",

  // ── WON'T HOLD ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    aum: 110,
